title: pavonia guianensis
intro: Pavonia guianensis, also known as rose mallow or Guianese pavonia, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the hibiscus family. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pavonia guianensis include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
